title: Oma’s Fudge
ingredients: 2 cups good quality semisweet chocolate chips
instructions: In large bowl, place walnuts, butter, and chocolate chips.

In saucepan, place sugar, marshmallows and milk. Heat, stirring, until mixture starts to boil. Cook, stirring constantly, for 6 minutes. Pour over chocolate mixture and let chocolate and butter melt. Stir well, add vanilla, and pour into lightly buttered square pan to harden. Let cool and cut into squares.
Katie used to love to make this at Christmas time. One of Mark’s favorite treats!
